abbreviations.definition: invisible decrease (like sc2tog, but only in the front loops)

rawInstruction: Slightly overstuff with Poly-fil (or other fiber fill). Do not close hole as it is difficult to reopen. Tuck tail into Knocker so that filling can be adjusted as needed.
summary: Slightly overstuff the Knocker with fiber fill, leaving the hole open for adjustment.
title: Stuff Knocker
